news.headline: Beijing appoints 40 international friendship ambassadors, promoting openness and global engagement. Xi Jinping emphasizes importance of friendship and cooperation.
news.summary: In Beijing on December 11, 2024, Chinese President Xi Jinping frequently references an ancient proverb during diplomatic events, stating, "No mountain or ocean can divide those with common goals." This emphasizes the strength of unity and collaboration in various partnerships.

news.headline: HK Monetary Authority reports results of RMB Sovereign Bond tenders on 12/11/24, with issuance of 2-year RMB Bonds.
news.summary: The outcomes of the RMB Sovereign Bond auctions held on December 11, 2024, were disclosed by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. The auction featured the issuance of RMB Bonds with a maturity period of 2 years.

news.headline: Nofar Energy secures 7-year fixed-price agreement for German BESS project, specialising in renewable energy.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on December 11, 2024, Nofar Energy, listed on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange with the ticker symbol NOFR, announced a significant achievement. The company, known as a global independent power producer (IPP) focusing on renewable energy and battery energy storage systems (BESS), has finalized a pioneering 7-year fixed-price Flexibility Purchase Agreement.

news.headline: Researchers at Kanazawa University discover how protein lamin A repairs DNA barrier, addressing rare genetic disorder in children.
news.summary: In Kanazawa, Japan, on December 11, 2024, scientists at the Nano Life Science Institute (WPI-NanoLSI) of Kanazawa University unveiled a groundbreaking discovery. Their research highlighted the significance of a protein named lamin A in the restoration of the shielding layer surrounding a cell's DNA. This revelation sheds light on the distinct function of lamin A and its promising implications for cellular repair mechanisms.

news.headline: Italy plans to reduce tax hike on crypto capital gains after backlash; League party MPs promise substantial reduction.
news.summary: Italian politicians from the ruling coalition have decided to decrease the planned tax increase on capital gains from cryptocurrency following backlash from the industry and internal dissent. Members of the League party, including lawmaker Giulio Centemero and Treasury Junior Minister Federico Freni, revealed that the tax hike will be notably reduced during the legislative process. They emphasized a shift away from past biases against cryptocurrencies. The government was considering maintaining the current tax rate amid the discussions.

news.headline: Treasury bills auctioned on 11 Dec 2024 with successful bids totaling $500 million.
Ageras acquires Shine from Société Générale, gets payment license, plans cross-border expansion of business banking platform.
news.summary: Ageras has successfully finalized the acquisition of Shine from Société Générale with the official approval of the French banking regulator ACPR. This transaction also grants Ageras a significant payment institution license. This pivotal license opens the opportunity for the French business banking platform to potentially expand into Ageras' domestic markets and beyond.

news.headline: Children's Museum of Pittsburgh gets $2.49 million grant for new exhibits exploring character traits like kindness and resilience.
news.summary: The Children's Museum of Pittsburgh has been awarded a generous grant of $2.49 million from Lilly Endowment Inc. This funding will be used to create a new permanent exhibit, a traveling exhibit, and additional programs and resources. These initiatives aim to delve into character traits such as kindness, generosity, compassion, respect, bravery, and resilience.

news.headline: Tria partners with Ensis AI to enhance proposal team, aiming to revolutionize proposal development process.
news.summary: Ensis, a leading provider of AI-driven software for proposal teams, has established a partnership with Tria Federal in San Francisco on December 10, 2024. The collaboration signifies a mutual understanding of the potential of artificial intelligence in revolutionizing the proposal development process. This partnership is set to leverage Ensis's expertise in AI technology to enhance Tria Federal's proposal development strategies.

news.headline: New Autism Learning Center opened in Worcester, MA by The Stepping Stones Group, offering ABA therapy.
news.summary: Located in Worcester, MA, the recently inaugurated Autism Learning Center by Community Autism Services, under The Stepping Stones Group, specializes in delivering Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) therapy within a center-based setting. Equipped with cutting-edge amenities, this facility prioritizes providing tailored and empathetic support to children dealing with autism.

news.headline: Sleepinox.com debuts natural sleep supplement by anesthesiologist Dr. David Mahjoubi, includes borage, ashwagandha, magnesium glycinate for restful sleep.
news.summary: A new natural sleep supplement has been recently introduced by Sleepinox.com. This innovative product is created by Dr. David Mahjoubi, a board-certified anesthesiologist, using a blend of organic and scientifically proven ingredients such as borage, ashwagandha, and magnesium glycinate to enhance peaceful and revitalizing sleep. This supplement is now accessible on their website for purchase.

news.headline: Transcard granted FCA approval as a payment institution in the UK, expanding open banking solutions globally.
news.summary: Transcard has successfully obtained authorization from the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) to operate as a payment institution in the United Kingdom. This significant achievement allows Transcard to provide open banking and payment initiation services in compliance with regulations, thus broadening its scope internationally. The approval from the FCA showcases Transcard's commitment to upholding financial standards and facilitating secure transactions.

news.headline: EWiT founder impressed by global growth since 2020 launch, hosting two Global Conferences with thousands of women.
news.summary: Since its inception in 2020, Extraordinary Women in Tech (EWiT) has seen impressive growth under the leadership of its founder. The organization has hosted two successful Global Conferences, attracting thousands of women in the tech industry. This initiative has created a thriving community for women in tech worldwide.

news.headline: Guide to watch NFR 2024 live streams on The Cowboy Channel and RFD-TV for free. NFR starts Dec. 10 in Las Vegas.
news.summary: The National Finals Rodeo 2024 will be available for free live streaming. The event is set to take place in Las Vegas starting on December 10, 2024. Round 1 is scheduled to begin on Thursday. Viewers can watch NFR on The Cowboy Channel Plus live and on-demand. Stay tuned for the date, time, and TV schedule for this exciting PRCA event.

news.headline: Makers Nutrition donates $500 in gift cards to Friends of Karen's Adopt-a-Family program for teens facing health challenges.
news.summary: Makers Nutrition has once again shown support for the Friends of Karen's Adopt-a-Family holiday program by contributing $500 worth of gift cards. The donation aims to empower teenagers dealing with significant health issues by allowing them to select gifts that bring them happiness and a sense of normalcy. Through this ongoing partnership, Makers Nutrition...

news.headline: Opus 2 introduces new features to streamline case workflows and enhance collaboration for legal teams, staying ahead in the evolving practice of law. London, Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: Opus 2 has launched innovative features to optimize case processes, boost teamwork, and offer enhanced analysis for legal professionals handling intricate tasks. In a press release dated December 10, 2024, the renowned legal technology company Opus 2 unveiled its latest tools aimed at transforming the way legal teams operate.

news.headline: Kaymbu receives growth funding from Decathlon Capital Partners to enhance platform and expand services, avoiding dilution.
news.summary: A software company in Cambridge, Massachusetts, announced on December 10, 2024, that they have secured a revenue-based funding package to aid in their growth and expansion efforts. Kaymbu, known for their classroom documentation and family engagement software in early childhood education, successfully obtained this funding without diluting their ownership stake. The funding will allow Kaymbu to scale their operations and reach more users in the early education sector.

news.headline: NFP bought Capstone Strategies, LLC to enhance benefits and P&C services for oil and gas firms in the Central region.
news.summary: NFP, a prominent property and casualty (P&C) broker, benefits consultant, wealth manager, and retirement plan company and subsidiary of Aon, has recently acquired a company in the oil and gas sector in the Central region. This acquisition is expected to enhance NFP's capabilities for oil and gas companies in that area. The deal, finalized on December 10, 2024, signifies a strategic move that will amplify NFP's offerings in the P&C sector. These developments are crucial as NFP continues to solidify its position in the industry and expand its reach.

news.headline: Federal court temporarily halts enforcement of Corporate Transparency Act, suspending BOIR filing requirement. Appeal pending.
news.summary: A federal court has issued a temporary pause on enforcing the Corporate Transparency Act (CTA), which mandates companies to submit Beneficial Ownership Information Reports (BOIR). This decision offers respite to businesses, with the requirement currently suspended. The case is being appealed, and a final verdict is pending.

news.headline: New segment on Empowered with Meg Ryan spotlights Ohio Community Health Recovery Centers for addiction treatment. Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent episode of Empowered with Meg Ryan, a new segment centered on a holistic method for addressing addiction treatment was showcased. Ohio Community Health Recovery Centers (OCHRC) took the spotlight in this episode. The program, aired on Dec. 11, 2024, based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, aims to shed light on effective addiction treatment approaches. Keep updated on Empowered with Meg Ryan for more insights on innovative recovery methods.

news.headline: Blubrry teams up with Adobe, offers podcasters free trial of Adobe Podcast and Express Premium to enhance editing process.
news.summary: COLUMBUS, Ohio - On December 11, 2024, Blubrry revealed an exciting development for podcasters: a partnership with Adobe offering a complimentary trial of Adobe Podcast and Express Premium. This collaboration aims to enhance the podcast creation experience with innovative tools. Customers utilizing Blubrry hosting will now have access to this trial, marking a significant step in streamlining podcast production.

news.headline: SPS North America wins Platinum Award for Best HR Strategy at 2024 Titan Business Awards for its Elevate Training Program.
news.summary: SPS North America, a prominent company offering business process outsourcing and advanced data management solutions, has recently received the prestigious Platinum Award for Best HR Strategy at the 2024 Titan Business Awards. This accolade recognizes the company's exceptional "Elevate for SPS" training program, which has garnered acclaim for its innovative approach to enhancing employee skills and performance. This recognition underscores SPS North America's commitment to excellence in human resources, highlighting its investment in employee development and training initiatives.

news.headline: transcosmos donates to Miyazaki Prefecture via corporate Furusato Nozei for Scholarship Repayment Support Project.
news.summary: transcosmos has recently contributed to Miyazaki Prefecture by participating in the corporate version of Furusato Nozei, a Japanese hometown tax program. The donation was made in support of the prefecture's Scholarship Repayment Support Project for the Creation of HINATA TOKYO. The donation took place on December 11, 2024, emphasizing transcosmos's commitment to giving back to the community. The specific amount of the donation was not disclosed.

news.headline: RetailWire CEO Dominick Miserandino joins Engage3's Technology Board to drive retail, brand, and e-commerce innovation, alongside other industry leaders. Davis, Calif., Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Miserandino has been appointed to Engage3's Technology Board in Davis, California. This move aligns with the company's mission to drive innovation in the retail and consumer packaged goods (CPG) industries. Engage3, in partnership with Dexi, specializes in aiding retailers and brands to increase revenue and foot traffic in stores. Miserandino will be working alongside prominent leaders in artificial intelligence (AI), retail, and CPG sectors to further enhance advancements in the field.

news.headline: NaturVet appoints Willie Post as Executive Director of US Sales with over 35 years of experience in pet healthcare and sales.
news.summary: NaturVet, based in TEMECULA, Calif., has named Willie Post as the new Executive Director of U.S. Sales. Post, previously a director at Boehringer Ingelheim, brings more than 35 years of expertise in pet healthcare and sales leadership to the role. The announcement was made on Dec. 11, 2024, underlining Post's extensive experience in the industry. The appointment showcases NaturVet's commitment to bolstering its sales team with seasoned professionals.

news.headline: Discover how ERC20 tokens are deployed on Linea's zkEVM by ConsenSys, boosting Ethereum compatibility, lowering costs, and enhancing scalability.
news.summary: Discover how ERC20 tokens are implemented on Linea, a zkEVM platform developed by ConsenSys. This innovative solution boosts Ethereum compatibility, slashes transaction expenses, and enhances scalability for users. Click to explore further.

news.headline: BoJ officials see less risk of a weak yen pushing up inflation.
British archaeologist Gordon Childe stresses the importance of comparative method in archaeology. Comparisons reveal parallels between Sanxingdui and Mayan remains.
news.summary: A renowned British archaeologist named Gordon Childe, known for his work in the field, expressed the view that archaeology involves the research and analysis of artifacts and sites. Childe underscored the significance of employing the comparative method within the discipline. Through comparative analysis, scholars can gain deeper insights into various cultures and historical contexts.

news.headline: Some BoJ officials not against a rate hike in December if proposed.
BoJ is said to see little cost to waiting for the next rate hike.
Janet Yellen warns Trump tariffs may hurt markets, raise costs. She cautions broad tariffs could harm competitiveness and households with higher costs.
news.summary: U.S. Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen expressed concerns about President-elect Donald Trump's proposed tariffs during a Wall Street Journal event. Yellen warned that while targeted tariffs can address trade imbalances, broad measures could lead to higher inflation and financial market instability. She emphasized that such tariffs may affect U.S. economic competitiveness and increase costs for American households. Yellen also criticized Trump's recent comments on monetary policy, stating that interfering with the Federal Reserve's independence could be detrimental. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: NATO could raise spending goal to as much as 3% of GDP - sources.
NATO considers new weapons, and equipment targets for member nations.
Xsolla partners with iBLOXX to promote Web3 games worldwide and launch StrayShot. Event in Dubai sparked alliance.
news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, Xsolla, a worldwide video game commerce company, has revealed a fresh partnership with iBLOXX, a studio that focuses on creating advanced multiplayer games on the blockchain. This collaboration emerged during the PGC Dubai event in April 2024, showcasing Xsolla’s dedication to promoting sustained development in the Middle East and Northern Africa gaming sector. The new alliance aims to support the growth of iBLOXX's blockchain games and enhance the gaming ecosystem in the region.

news.headline: Xsolla and Mastercard introduce Pay With Points in Poland through Alior Bank, allowing gamers to use loyalty points for in-game purchases.
news.summary: In a recent development, Xsolla, a worldwide video game commerce entity, has collaborated with Mastercard to extend their partnership to Poland via Alior Bank. This partnership enables Mastercard users with Alior Bank to utilize Xsolla Pay with Points feature, allowing them to convert their loyalty points into in-game purchases directly within Xsolla's Pay Station. Facilitated by Mastercard's digital redemption functionalities, this integration now allows gamers the convenience of paying for purchases using their loyalty points seamlessly.

news.headline: DTR launches platform in Zug, Switzerland to simplify global payments infrastructure. #fintech #AmalgamOS
news.summary: A fintech company called Distributed Technologies Research has launched its technology platform in Zug, Switzerland. The company is focused on simplifying global payments infrastructure under the name AmalgamOS. This launch marks a significant milestone for the company in its mission to streamline payment processes worldwide.

news.headline: First insight partners with M&S for digital growth. Originally focused on Lingerie since 2015, now expands to all Clothing & Home categories.
news.summary: Pittsburgh-based First Insight, a prominent company specializing in Voice of the Customer retail solutions, is broadening its collaboration with Marks & Spencer (M&S), a top UK retailer, to hasten its digital evolution. The partnership, which commenced in 2015 concentrating on the Lingerie sector, has now expanded to encompass M&S’s complete Clothing & Home division. This expansion enables M&S to amplify customer involvement and brand image across all sectors.

news.headline: Il Lanificio, an Italian apparel brand, expands with 2 new stores in France and Sicily, now totaling 20 stores in Europe.
news.summary: Italian apparel brand Il Lanificio, a Njord Partners portfolio company, is excited to share the launch of two new stores in France and Sicily this December. With these new additions, Il Lanificio's European presence now spans 20 stores, reflecting the brand's ambitious growth strategy across the continent. The upcoming store in Roppenheim, France, will be located in the largest outlet mall in the country, a key attraction for French and German shoppers alike.

news.headline: British Army tests RTX's Raytheon High-Energy Laser Weapon System for the first time at MoD range in Wales. #RTX #laserweapon #UKarmy
news.summary: Raytheon UK recently conducted a test of their High-Energy Laser Weapon System (HELWS) at a Ministry of Defense range in Wales. The test involved soldiers successfully targeting moving objects with the laser weapon. This achievement took place in London on December 11, 2024. Raytheon, a part of RTX's business under the ticker symbol NYSE: RTX, reported the completion of this live-firing exercise, demonstrating the effectiveness of their laser technology.

news.headline: US economy expected to outperform global peers, with GDP growth predicted below 2%; California's economy to grow slower than expected due to new policies.
news.summary: Despite uncertainties, the United States economy is predicted to outperform other countries globally. However, the GDP growth is anticipated to drop to under 2% on a seasonally adjusted annual rate. California's economy is projected to grow at a slower pace than initially expected as it adapts to the changing national economic conditions.

news.headline: Hunton Andrews Kurth LLP adds 5 partners and 5 associates from EY Law in London to strengthen its global energy team.
news.summary: London-based law firm Hunton Andrews Kurth LLP has recently bolstered its presence in the city by welcoming approximately twelve esteemed lawyers specializing in energy and project finance. Among them are Partners Charles Morrison, Dimitri Papaefstratiou, Simon Collier, Harry Brunt, Counsel Joseph Lam, and Consultant Grant Henderson, along with five associates. This team transitioned from Ernst & Young’s legal division, EY Law, and is dedicated to handling transactions within diverse energy fields including oil and gas, renewable energy, and more.

news.headline: FANCY SPRINKLES™ partners with Walmart to launch Fancy Baking Confetti, aiming to replace chocolate chips. Los Angeles, Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: Drenched in vibrant colors and exuding joy, the innovative Fancy Baking Confetti is revolutionizing the baking scene, rivalling the traditional bag of chocolate chips. Recently in Los Angeles on December 11, 2024, leading brand FANCY SPRINKLES™ announced a bold move with their remarkable product launch. This season, FANCY is making waves with a fresh approach aimed at enhancing the modest...

news.headline: Negal Engineering AG named one of 2024's Top 20 Most Innovative Companies by Business Worldwide Magazine, recognizing pioneers in power electronics and renewable energy solutions.
news.summary: In London on December 11, 2024, Negal Engineering AG, a leading Swiss company in power electronics and renewable energy solutions, has been acknowledged as one of the top "20 Most Innovative Companies to Watch in 2024" by Business Worldwide Magazine. This distinguished recognition highlights companies that stand out for their innovation and impact in the industry.

news.headline: China Airlines integrates iCargo solution by IBS Software into its strategic management infrastructure.
news.summary: In Taoyuan, Taiwan on December 11, 2024, China Airlines (CI), the top Taiwanese carrier, announced the successful integration of IBS Software's iCargo solution into its air cargo management system. This move enhances their strategic operations with cutting-edge digital technology.

news.headline: Enfinity Global secures €165M financing for 147MW solar projects in Italy's Lazio region.
news.summary: Enfinity Global Inc., a prominent player in the renewable energy sector, has successfully secured a total of €165 million in funding for the development of three large-scale solar power facilities in Italy's Lazio region. These plants will have a cumulative capacity of 147 MW. The investment will be utilized to drive the construction and operation of these utility-scale solar projects.

news.headline: Amwins Global Risks appoints Gabriel Ewing to lead new Transactional Risk practice in London.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Amwins Global Risks, the international division of well-known specialty insurance broker Amwins and a major independent wholesale broker in London, revealed the selection of Gabriel Ewing as the leader of its recently established Transactional Risk practice.

news.headline: New Oriental Education & Tech Group Inc. announces board changes, Dr. John Zhuang Yang resigns. (Characters: 97)
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, New Oriental Education & Technology Group Inc. revealed that Dr. John Zhuang Yang has resigned as an independent member of the company. New Oriental is a prominent private educational services provider in China and is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol EDU and on the SEHK as 9901. This development signifies a change within the leadership of the company.

news.headline: Earnings report on Dec 11, 2024: Vera Bradley: $0.06/share, $98.70M revenue REV Group: $0.49/share, $603.33M revenue Macy's: $0.03/share, $4.72B revenue Cognyte Software: expected loss $0.04/share.
news.summary: Several companies are set to report their quarterly earnings before the bell, providing insights into their financial performances:- Vera Bradley (NASDAQ:VRA) is anticipated to announce earnings of $0.06 per share with revenue around $98.70 million.- REV Group (NYSE:REVG) is expected to reveal earnings of $0.49 per share, with revenue estimated at $603.33 million.- Macy's (NYSE:M) is projected to report earnings of $0.03 per share and revenue of approximately $4.72 billion.- Cognyte Software (NASDAQ:CGNT) is likely to report a quarterly loss of $0.04 per share, however the revenue figure was not provided in the available information. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: RBA's Hauser reiterates RBA statement reflects board's evolving view.
2024 Universities 100 Mile Relay Finals in Shanghai concluded on Dec. 8, celebrating youth and international collaboration.
news.summary: In Shanghai on December 8, 2024, the 2024 Universities 100 Mile Relay concluded with a thrilling grand finale, highlighting a vibrant showcase of youth, enthusiasm, and global cooperation. The event was not only a sporting competition but also a platform for promoting...
